meta.name: Activation Rate Monitor
meta.description: Track new user activation rates (completing key actions within N days), segment by cohort, and alert when activation rate falls below target.

parameters.content:
## 29 — Activation Rate Monitor

**Required:**
- ACTIVATION_SHEET_ID: columns cohort_week, segment, new_users, activated_7d, activated_14d, activated_30d
- ACTIVATION_TARGET_PCT: target activation % within 14d (default: 40)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Weekly on Monday at 09:30
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🚀 Activation Report {{ $json.week }}: avg 14d {{ $json.avg_14d_activation }}% (target {{ $json.target_pct }}%) | {{ $json.below_target_count }} cohorts below
